note: Discovery only. Ideas + which primary sources to chase. Write original from primary sources; never republish.

leads.title: Inside the Rise of Competitive Fitness Spurred by Hyrox
leads.summary: As fitness-competition phenomenon Hyrox scales globally, a wave of challengers are racing to define what comes next.

leads.title: ATN Insights: 49% of Lapsed Members Say Their Gym Never Reached Out After They Stopped Attending
leads.summary: Zenoti's new fitness consumer survey reveals a chasm between the engagement members expect from their gyms, and what they’re actually receiving.

leads.title: Future Pulls the Plug on AI Personal Training, Commits to Human Coaches
leads.summary: Future is among the first in the fitness app space to pull back from AI at a time when most are racing toward it.

leads.title: Longtime UK Equipment Maker Pulse Fitness Expands Into US Market
leads.summary: Pulse Fitness has its sights set on the United States' commercial fitness equipment market.

leads.title: Playlist Adds Palantir CFO to Board, Fueling Future IPO Talks
leads.summary: Playlist, the parent of ClassPass and EGYM, has named Palantir CFO David Glazer to its board as the fitness and wellness tech company weighs a future IPO.

leads.title: YogaSix Launches Pilates-Inspired Class in Boutique Fitness Crossover
leads.summary: YogaSix has launched Y6 Core, a heated, Pilates-inspired class that maintains the yoga franchise's signature methodology.

leads.title: Amped Fitness Taps Red Bull to Curate Member Experiences
leads.summary: Amped Fitness has partnered with Red Bull to create new events and activations in and outside of its clubs across the U.S.

leads.title: Ultrahuman Adds OTC Glucose Tracking Through Abbott Lingo Partnership
leads.summary: Smart ring maker Ultrahuman is integrating Abbott’s Lingo over-the-counter CGM as glucose data becomes a key frontier in connected wellness.

leads.title: AI Startup Midjourney Pivots to Health With Ultrasound Machine
leads.summary: Chief executive officer David Holz revealed what he described as a “full-body ultrasound machine” called the Midjourney Scanner as part of a new division Midjourney Medical.

leads.title: ATN Innovation Summit ’26 Day Two: Building the Future of Fitness & Wellness
leads.summary: Go inside some of the key moments, takeaways and insights from day two of the fitness and wellness industry's premier event.

leads.title: Solius Targets Vitamin D Deficiency With Personalized UVB Light Therapy
leads.summary: Solius Labs is introducing an at-home UVB medical device that tailors sunlight therapy to individual skin profiles.

leads.title: Clair Health Raises $11.6M for Continuous Hormone-Tracking Wearable
leads.summary: Clair Health, a jewelry-inspired wearable startup, is building what it calls the first noninvasive wearable that continuously tracks women's hormones.
